text:
is a guidebook for Neon Genesis Evangelions video game by Kadokawa Game Collection. It was published by Kadokawa Shoten on 20 November 2003. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4840226423 

Overview

Strategy book for version of Neon Genesis Evangelions. 

Includes detailed data on all Evangelions and all Angels, Ikuto Yamashita and settei pictures, Evangelion glossary, system commentary approaching the mystery of Anno AI, and all 4 episodes of replay comics.
